requirements.task_name: Save the top 2 reclaimed wood wall art projects under 3 hours to a new collection
requirements.task_description: Find wall art projects that use reclaimed wood with a maximum build time of 3 hours, sort them by rating, and save the top 2 results into a new collection named 'Quick Reclaimed Wall Art'. Success is achieved when that collection contains exactly those two projects.

requirements.task_name: Comment on the highest-rated beginner wood burning tutorial from the last 3 months
requirements.task_description: Search for wood burning tutorials, filter for beginner difficulty and posts from the last 3 months, sort by rating, open the top result, and post a comment with a specific message. Success is achieved when that tutorial has your comment added.

requirements.task_name: Post a new question in the 'Beginner Tools' forum about chisels under $100
requirements.task_description: Use the forum to search for existing threads about beginner chisel sets, then create a new topic in the 'Beginner Tools' subforum with a specific title and content asking for recommendations under $100. Success is achieved when the new topic is posted in the correct subforum with the specified title.

requirements.task_name: Create a gift wishlist of 3 wall art pieces under $60 each with total under $150
requirements.task_description: In the marketplace, find wooden wall art pieces with ratings of at least 4.5 stars and individual prices under $60, then add exactly 3 items whose combined price is not more than $150 to a wishlist named 'Gift Ideas'. Success is achieved when the 'Gift Ideas' wishlist contains exactly 3 qualifying items within the budget.

requirements.task_name: Build a beginner practice reading list with 2 carving and 2 joinery posts under 20 minutes
requirements.task_description: Find beginner-level blog posts in the 'Carving' and 'Joinery' categories, each with an estimated reading time of 20 minutes or less, and add exactly 2 from each category to a reading list named 'Beginner Practice Plan'. Success is achieved when the reading list contains 4 posts: 2 carving and 2 joinery.

requirements.task_name: Follow 2 top geometric-style artists and enable notifications for their new projects
requirements.task_description: Use the artist directory to find geometric-style woodworking artists with at least 5 completed projects, sort by follower count, then follow the top 2 and enable in-site notifications for their new project posts. Success is achieved when both artists are followed and notifications are turned on for each.

requirements.task_name: Create a materials list from the 'Floating Shelf with Hidden Mounting' project
requirements.task_description: Find the 'Floating Shelf with Hidden Mounting' project and copy all listed materials into a project materials list using the site's materials-list feature. Success is achieved when all materials from that project are added to a materials list named 'Floating Shelf Build List'.

requirements.task_name: Register for the cheapest beginner wood carving online workshop next month under $40
requirements.task_description: Use the events or workshops section to find online beginner wood carving workshops scheduled for next calendar month, filter for prices of $40 or less, sort by price, select the cheapest option, and complete the registration form using the 'Pay Later' or equivalent non-external payment option. Success is achieved when the registration for that specific workshop is submitted.
